---

title: "D01_06: Master Execution Flow"
subtitle: "Complete D01 execution orchestration and ETL integration"
parent: "D01_dna_analysis"
chapter: "CH12"
category: "derivation-task"
number: "D01_06"
date-created: "2025-12-14"
date-modified: "2026-02-08"
author: "Claude"
type: "derivation-task"
depends_on:
  - "D01_00_consume_etl_output"
  - "D01_01_customer_aggregation"
  - "D01_02_rfm_calculation"
  - "D01_03_dna_analysis"
  - "D01_04_customer_profile"
  - "D01_05_app_views"
outputs_to:
  - "execution_result"
implements:
  - script: "cbz_D01_06.R"
    path: "update_scripts/DRV/cbz/"
  - script: "amz_D01_06.R"
    path: "update_scripts/DRV/amz/"
  - script: "eby_D01_06.R"
    path: "update_scripts/DRV/eby/"
  - script: "all_D01_06.R"
    path: "update_scripts/DRV/all/"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-fold: false
---

# D01_06: Master Execution Flow {#overview}

This task orchestrates the full D01 sequence.

## Master Execution Flow (NSQL)

```nsql
EXECUTE D01_complete:
  STEP 1: D01_00_consume_etl01_output
  STEP 2: D01_01_customer_aggregation
  STEP 3: D01_02_customer_features_and_dna
  STEP 4: D01_03_customer_profile_creation
  STEP 5: D01_04_application_views_generation
  STEP 6: D01_05_final_validation
```

## Sequencing Rules

1. `D01_02` must complete before `D01_04` because app views depend on DNA outputs.
2. `D01_03` must complete before `D01_04` because app views depend on profile outputs.
3. `D01_05` is validation-only and runs last.

## Five-Part Structure Compliance (DM_R044)

Each `{platform}_D01_06.R` script must follow Initialize -> Main -> Test -> Summarize -> Deinitialize.

## Key Principle

D01_06 performs orchestration only and contains no business metric calculations.
